raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Reporting an empirical observation of consciousness to affirm the primacy of willful action in shaping inner states",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Behavior originates from a domain of agency that can precede and determine affective consciousness",
    "Mood is a responsive rather than generative aspect of being",
    "Repeated noticing reveals a reliable directional relationship between action and felt experience"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a framework where action is an expression of higher will that molds subtler layers of consciousness",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Action is understood as aligned with transcendent purpose rather than mechanical habit, allowing behavior to serve as a vehicle for spiritual integration",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Behavior is treated as arbitrarily imposed without reference to inner truth, thereby bypassing authentic signals from the deeper self"
}
